screener_meta.stage2_avg_vol_basis: 30-day average daily volume from get_equity_fundamentals (used as ADV; threshold >5,000,000 shares)
screener_meta.note: INIO matched mktcap+ADV but was EXCLUDED: only 14 real daily bars (recent listing) -> cannot compute 14-day ATR / 20-day EMA precisely. STX/TER failed 30-day ADV>5M. Scan returned 200/261 rows (61 untruncated, mostly small-caps); see SCAN_TRUNCATION alert. Built 2026-06-25 09:43 ET; reused thereafter today.

alerts.detail: STILL OPEN (reaffirmed this 10:00 ET market-hours run). Account 436021893 holds two positions this bot opened on 2026-06-24 but that were NEVER persisted to state.positions (06-24 market-hours runs placed live orders then failed to commit state -- see GIT_PUSH_AUTH root cause). CURRENT (06-25 ~10:00 ET): COMP 2sh (avg 10.67), live ~10.81, with agentic resting GTC stop-limit sell stop 10.30 / limit 10.14 (order 6a3bf3cf-00e0-4f2e-b5d1-361cd025b3f1), state=confirmed; NO take-profit (+6%) leg ever placed. AAL 2sh (avg 17.26), live ~17.62, with agentic resting GTC stop-limit sell stop 16.66 / limit 16.40 (order 6a3c01c6-5dc5-4028-8248-b15d57201e59), state=confirmed; NO take-profit (+6%) leg ever placed. Per Ground Rules the bot only manages positions opened AND recorded in state.positions; these are NOT recorded and faithfully adopting them would require GUESSING the missing entry metadata (phase, peak_price, the missing TP legs) which the prompt forbids -> LEFT COMP/AAL AND their resting stops COMPLETELY UNTOUCHED again this run (no stops added, no TP added, no liquidation, not adopted). OPERATOR DECISION STILL NEEDED: (a) manually add COMP/AAL to state.positions (with chosen entry price/phase) if you want the bot to manage/exit them -- note brackets are stop-loss-only, no take-profit; or (b) keep managing them yourself. Root cause to fix: container persistence/push reliability so market-hours runs cannot place live orders without recording them.

Structural condition (reaffirmed 10:00 ET): per-position budget = 6% x total account equity ($309.09) = $18.55, and the rules require a MINIMUM of 2 whole shares per entry. 23 of 24 screener survivors are too expensive to buy 2 shares within $18.55 (need ask <= $9.27; e.g. BB ask $10.21, QXO $17.50, RKT $15.10, all others far higher) -> max affordable whole shares < 2 -> any signal on them is non-actionable and skipped per the 'minimum 2 shares' guardrail. The ONLY survivor affordable at 2 shares is FRMI (ask ~$8.23 -> 2sh=$16.46), but FRMI fired NO entry signal this run (momentum: 8.24 < prior-day [06-24] high 9.08; dip: ~18.7% below rolling 5-day intraday high 10.135 [06-18], or ~14.9% below the 4-most-recent-day high 9.685, both outside the 3.5-5.0% band). Net: 0 entries possible this run. Operator should note the account size makes most large-cap movers untradeable under the 6%/2-share rule.

From today's 09:43 ET screener build: run_scan('Top Most Active Movers') reported total_items=261 but returned only 200 instrument rows; the remaining 61 were not retrievable via the tool. The top of the returned set is dominated by small-caps; 52 of the 200 had mktcap>5B and were fully Stage-2 screened. Some of the 61 untruncated rows could in principle have been large-cap survivors but were not available to screen. Did NOT call get_scans/create_scan (per Step 5 rules). Documented for transparency.

RECURRING infra issue: containers may start with a STALE/empty checkout and the default remote URL has no usable push credential. THIS 10:00 ET RUN: container started at a STALE local HEAD (a4c66d5 = 06-24 09:01 state) that was BEHIND authoritative origin/main (28eb987 = 06-25 09:43 state). Recovered by fetching origin/main with proxy bypass (git -c http.proxy= fetch) and hard-resetting onto it BEFORE acting, so this run built on the correct authoritative state. Push via: git -c http.proxy= push https://x-access-token:$GITHUB_TOKEN@github.com/polishbandit/trading-routine.git (the url.insteadOf local_proxy rewrite returns 403; bare oauth2:@ URL is rejected). Operator should fix persistent remote credential + guarantee containers clone current main.

STEP 4 exits: no tracked positions -> no TP/SL/trailing work. STEP 5 screener: REUSED today's stored 24-survivor list (screener_date=2026-06-25); NOT rebuilt. STEP 6 entries (LIVE): NO entry. Affordability: 6% x $309.09 = $18.55/position, min 2 whole shares -> only FRMI affordable (ask $8.23 -> 2sh $16.46); FRMI fired no signal (momentum 8.24 < prior-day [06-24] high 9.08; dip ~18.7% below rolling 5d intraday high 10.135 / ~14.9% below 4-day high 9.685, outside 3.5-5.0% band). All 23 other survivors non-actionable on the 2-share minimum (need ask <= $9.27). Settled buying_power $237.45 ample but moot. NO orders placed/cancelled.
